_comment: THE TWIN config (canon, committed). Three unconditioned daily binary markets — the honest statistics of n=1 demand humility. Constitutional clamps live in twin.mjs code, not here: win-only voicing, cold-start gag (30 scored resolutions + beats-base-rate before ANY voice), dead-market pruning, and NO dread-class markets (any market id matching abandon/fail/dread/quit/stall is structurally stripped at load).
